evolution_arms.purpose: Reduce preventable formatting/tool-contract waste before the 1,000 ramp.

changes: gap strings must name missing source and repair condition
evolution_arms.purpose: Convert stale/thin evidence into auditable gap strings and follow-up tool requests.

changes: rank actor quality and reject behavior
evolution_arms.purpose: Make Hydromancer/HL-node observations first-class graph edges instead of sidecar context.
evolution_arms.success_gate: node_promoted_string_rate increases without adversarial quarantine rising

evolution_arms.purpose: Let the map shape choose independent follow-up scouts for high tension/frontier cells.
evolution_arms.success_gate: top geometry cells receive independent scout confirmation, contradiction, or kill signal

changes: keep 20+ matched seed pairs at 100+ scale
evolution_arms.purpose: Continue matched control/candidate policy testing instead of hand-picking a prompt by taste.
evolution_arms.success_gate: candidate improves accepted unique high-quality coverage per dollar without worsening low-EV tool rate

examples.hypothesis_text: WLD intraday money velocity is suppressed by stale funding data and a lack of fresh on-chain flow evidence, requiring a source-health repair before directional conviction can be formed.

failure_modes.mitigation: Node payloads are captured but need stronger actor/source coverage before promotion into trade strings.
Keep strict pressure: if strings exist, hypothesis must summarize the best valid string.
Stale/thin data should become a low-conviction gap string with evidence refs, not an empty packet.

examples.hypothesis_text: Griffain will underperform relative to BTC and ETH on a 1-quarter horizon due to deteriorating on-chain liquidity and high noob rejection rates at Hyperliquid that suppress order-book recovery.
WIF 1d microstructure is dominated by stale funding data and pervasive noob reject flow that suppresses perceived funding, making a squeeze unlikely without fresh catalyst.

failure_modes.mitigation: Suggested tools are filtered against allowed_tool_candidates before persistence.

failure_modes.mitigation: Strings without provided refs should become tool_requests or be rejected by prompt quality.

examples.hypothesis_text: IO microstructure anomaly (VPIN≥0.3, high OFI, stale source health) indicates elevated informed-flow risk that will degrade liquidity within 1 day absent fresh order-book refresh.

failure_modes.mitigation: Stale evidence should map source-health gaps instead of directional trade claims.

next_ramp_policy.intent: Apply live-100 learning as a monotonic seed policy patch for the next evaluator-gated ramp.
ramp_success_requirements: json_unparseable_rate == 0 or scout_json_retry_success covers every miss
scheduled production remains blocked until two independent 1,000-scout shadow runs pass repeatability gates

next_run.operator_note: The 1,000 ramp is allowed by tournament evidence, but scheduled production remains blocked until two independent 1,000-scout shadow runs pass repeatability gates.

pre_1000_gate.interpretation: The 1,000 ramp may run only as an explicitly authorized experiment. The listed repair metrics must be watched; passing the ramp does not schedule production.

ramp_success_requirements: json_unparseable_rate == 0 or scout_json_retry_success covers every miss

repair_work_orders.action: Run fallback JSON repair before dropping non-calendar scouts; preserve raw transcript and flag repair success/failure.
repair_work_orders.success_gate: json_unparseable_rate == 0 across the next ramp or every parse miss has scout_json_retry_success.

repair_work_orders.action: Filter suggested_tools against allowed_tool_candidates and keep invented tool desire only as an analysis_tool_proposal.
repair_work_orders.success_gate: invented_tool_persist_rate == 0; proposed missing tools appear only in tool_requests/tool_proposals.

repair_work_orders.action: Force hypothesis to summarize the best valid string; if no valid string exists, emit a gap string or abstain with explicit missing edge.
Convert thin/stale evidence into low-conviction source-gap strings with kill signals instead of empty packets.
repair_work_orders.success_gate: missing_information_strings_rate <= 0.01 for scouts with usable evidence or allowed repair tools.

repair_work_orders.action: Reject or route strings that cannot cite provided tool_call_log_id/source refs; ask for a follow-up tool when the edge is missing.
repair_work_orders.success_gate: missing_evidence_refs_rate <= 0.01 and tool_request_followup_rate rises on missing-edge cells.

repair_work_orders.action: Treat stale observations as source-health gaps unless a fresh ref bridges the time horizon.
repair_work_orders.success_gate: stale_directionality_flag_rate <= 0.01 and stale evidence produces repair_source/gap strings.

repair_work_orders.action: Route quarantined strings to source repair or independent replication before verifier spend.
repair_work_orders.success_gate: quarantine_to_repair_route_rate >= 0.95 and quarantined strings are excluded from promoted trade hypotheses.

repair_work_orders.action: Upgrade node intelligence from sidecar context to actor/source-backed graph edges when wallet quality, reject behavior, or builder flow is source-backed.
repair_work_orders.success_gate: node_promoted_string_rate improves while adversarial_quarantine_rate does not rise.

repair_work_orders.action: Allocate independent follow-up scouts to top geometry cells before verifier spend.
repair_work_orders.success_gate: Each top cell receives confirmation, contradiction, or kill signal from an independent scout/source family.

repair_work_orders.action: Keep paired control/candidate policy slices in the next ramp and reject mutations that improve quality by spending low-EV tools.
repair_work_orders.success_gate: Candidate arm wins hard gates or is rejected with falsification evidence.

summary: The live run earned `promote_to_1000_scout_ramp` with average prompt quality 0.862 and 11/100 scouts carrying at least one repair signal. The system should treat the next scale step as an evaluator-gated ramp, not production; the main repair pockets are node_not_promoted, empty_hypothesis, missing_information_strings.

tournament.reason: The 100+ scout live distribution passed provider reliability, string yield, duplicate, prompt-quality, temporal-structure, geometry, self-healing, and MarketEvolve proof gates. A 1,000-scout ramp is allowed under a hard cap; it is still a ramp, not an always-on production schedule.

weak_scouts.hypothesis_text: WLD intraday money velocity is suppressed by stale funding data and a lack of fresh on-chain flow evidence, requiring a source-health repair before directional conviction can be formed.
Griffain will underperform relative to BTC and ETH on a 1-quarter horizon due to deteriorating on-chain liquidity and high noob rejection rates at Hyperliquid that suppress order-book recovery.
IO microstructure anomaly (VPIN≥0.3, high OFI, stale source health) indicates elevated informed-flow risk that will degrade liquidity within 1 day absent fresh order-book refresh.
WIF 1d microstructure is dominated by stale funding data and pervasive noob reject flow that suppresses perceived funding, making a squeeze unlikely without fresh catalyst.
